use_cases: Displaying blog posts or articles in a responsive grid layout on content-driven websites
Showcasing latest publications or news updates on media platforms
Featuring thought leadership content on SaaS marketing pages
Listing educational resources or tutorials on learning platforms
Presenting portfolio pieces or case studies on creative agency sites
ai_summary: A responsive blog article grid component featuring three cards with category badges, images, titles, descriptions, and publish dates. Each card has a subtle glass-morphism effect with backdrop blur and displays hover shadow transitions. Supports dark mode and uses Next.js Image optimization. Designed for content-heavy platforms needing to showcase articles in an organized, visually appealing grid that adapts from mobile single-column to desktop three-column layouts.
